title: psacalium peltatum
intro: Psacalium peltatum is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is commonly known as Jerusalem daisy or false daisy. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Psacalium peltatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with the dried flowers and leaves typically being used in herbal preparations.
